ref: All beings in heaven and on earth receive their life from him.
text: Ba naa maga nyɛn o tɔhɔn ti ni awa ba naa se su un tɛɛnɛ nɔ maga ni, waa ya ba nyana.

ref: God is wonderful and glorious. I pray that his Spirit will make you become strong followers
text: Koosa kpak jirima awa chaani kinkan. Chendaha muu sumi unu di o nyɛ o siim weri ti lisi a li o kpok ti ni a du ma bambe ni,

ref: and that Christ will live in your hearts because of your faith. Stand firm and be deeply rooted in his love.
text: chen ni Yesu Kristo zi nyɛn dooniu a gbaari ma se su un daha. O kpok ti nyɛn ma ni nɛnɛ, ma gbanko zi daŋni unu awa dɔŋ ni a gbaari,

ref: I pray that you and all God's people will understand what is called wide or long or high or deep.
text: chen ni ma wa Koosa nara maga zi kotiu a zim chenani Yesu Kristo daŋni ya a kaali a maga.

ref: I want you to know all about Christ's love, although it is too wonderful to be measured. Then your lives will be filled with all that God is.
text: Mu daŋni ma wa zim chenani Yesu Kristo daŋni ya chenu. O daŋni yau hali ya vɛ koti a zim a la peti, amaa mu daŋni o daŋni ti siu ma ni, chen ni ma zi weru o chi Koosa wer chen.

ref: I pray that Christ Jesus and the church will forever bring praise to God. His power at work in us can do far more than we dare ask or imagine. Amen.
text: O nitiŋɛ ta wa Yesu Kristo naa ya ba nyuhu tiina, zi nyɛ un jirimau hali saha naa vɛ kpak bɔ. Ami.

ref: As a prisoner of the Lord, I beg you to live in a way that is worthy of the people God has chosen to be his own.
text: Mu waa naa ba fun tɔ dɛ ya kunyan ti daha, mu sumi mau di ma tiŋ chenani deŋlee wa ma tiŋ. Koosa funɛ yir ma di ma tiŋ chen.

ref: Always be humble and gentle. Patiently put up with each other and love each other.
text: Ma ya jɛrgɛ tima a kpak dɔŋ wa kanyita saha maga. Maa suŋi dɔŋa, chen ni nara zi zimu di maa daŋni dɔŋau.

ref: Try your best to let God's Spirit keep your hearts united. Do this by living at peace.
text: Koosa siim weri ti funɛ nyɛ ma ya nɔ bɛgimu wa dɔŋ ni a nyɛ ma bara sɔɔna. Maa kpaŋi saha maga a kiya dɔŋa chen.

ref: All of you are part of the same body. There is only one Spirit of God, just as you were given one hope when you were chosen to be God's people.
text: Koosa siim weri ti ya nibɛgimnɛ. Ba naa maga se su Yesu, ba ya nibɛgimnɛ. Koosa gbanko funɛ lisi ma di chenani ma kpak bambi bɛgim un ni ya kibɛgimnɛ.

ref: There is one God who is the Father of all people. Not only is God above all others, but he works by using all of us, and he lives in all of us.
text: Koosa titi naa dɔ ya a nyɛn ya ni a nyɛ ya tum tuma a nyɛ un, o ya nibɛgimnɛ.

ref: Christ has generously divided out his gifts to us.
text: Yesu Kristo yaa suŋi yau di ya kaa suŋi ya dɔŋtima.

ref: This also means that the one who went deep into the earth is the same one who went into the highest heaven, so he would fill the whole universe.
text: O saha funɛ wa peti tɛɛnɛ nɔ maga ni, o fun bur a zini a kaali Koosa nihɛɛ bar kani di o su kin naa maga Koosa fun naami.

ref: This will continue until we are united by our faith and by our understanding of the Son of God. Then we will be mature, just as Christ is, and we will be completely like him.
text: Ya se su Koosa be a gbaari a wa zim un nɛnɛ, ya maga zi kpak nɔ bɛgimu wa dɔŋ ni. Ya ya chen, ya zi mak nibaalau a burgi a chi chenani Yesu Kristo wer a peti chen.

ref: Love should always make us tell the truth. Then we will grow in every way and be more like Christ, the head
text: O lawa ya mak nibaalu, chen ni ba wa zi bu muksi ya. Yesu Kristo ya ya nyuhu tiina. Ma nyɛ yaa daŋni dɔŋa a kisɛm dɔŋa wa wuti. Ya ya chen a gbaari, ya zi chi unu.

ref: of the body. Christ holds it together and makes all of its parts work perfectly, as it grows and becomes strong because of love. The Old Life and the New Life
text: Ya chi o bara luk pɛksiwa. Waa nyɛ o bara kpok a li boma naa chomse ya ni. Ya maga tum nɛnɛ a la daŋni dɔŋa aa tiŋ un nɛnɛ a gbaari, o bara zi na alaafɛu. Koosa Daŋni Ya Tum Tum Were A Nyɛ Un

ref: As a follower of the Lord, I order you to stop living like stupid, godless people.
text: Domi ma wa ma kunyan ti ya nibɛgim daha, mu daŋni mu ŋɔ ma di ma ta nyɛni a chi ba naa vɛ zim Koosa nyɛni. Chenani ba lisi ya yɔrirɛ,

ref: Their minds are in the dark, and they are stubborn and ignorant and have missed out on the life that comes from God. They no longer have any feelings about what is right,
text: ka ba se fun vɛ lɛli. Ba se kpoka wa fun nyɛ ba zim Koosa. Chendaha o vɛ koti a kpa o mi fali ti a nyɛ ba.

ref: and they are so greedy they do all kinds of indecent things.
text: Saha maga ba yaa tum chɔkumsi tuma awa doŋ tumwa aa ya se tima. Ba galɛ hiisa naali niu.

ref: But this isn't what you were taught about Jesus Christ. He is the truth, and you heard about him and learned about him.
text: Ba funɛ wa biksi ma o wɛ, ba funɛ ŋɔ o wuti tiu a nyɛ ma. Ma fun nu a la nɔɔni aa tiŋ un.

ref: You were told that your foolish desires will destroy you and that you must give up your old way of life with all its bad habits.
text: Adaha lalaknɔ ma kpa ma gantɛl tuha wɛ a ta. A waa funɛ nyɛ maa tiŋ ma tutɔ daŋnɛ a kpa ma du nyinbaan naa ma zi chɔk ni.

ref: Let the Spirit change your way of thinking
text: O lawa ma nyɛ Koosa kpa ma bambe liseu a burgi a kifalɛ a gbaari.

ref: and make you into a new person. You were created to be like God, and so you must please him and be truly holy. Rules for the New Life
text: Ma suwachak tuha wɛ a naa Koosa fun kpa a nyɛ ma, a waa la zi nyɛ ma wa chi un. Koosa ya wuti tiina awa tu chaan tiina a la tum tum were saha maga.

ref: We are part of the same body. Stop lying and start telling each other the truth.
text: O chi ma maga ya Yesu Kristo bara luk pɛksiwa. Chendaha ma ta suni wɛ a nyɛ dɔŋ ni. Ma ka sɛm wuti sɛma a nyɛ ma dɔŋtim ni.

ref: Don't get so angry that you sin. Don't go to bed angry
text: Ma na paan a du nandigi ni, ma ta kpa chen a du ma tusi ni a vusi.

ref: and don't give the devil a chance.
text: Ma ta nyɛ sintana wa nyinbaan o nyɛ maa tum tum tagna.

ref: If you are a thief, quit stealing. Be honest and work hard, so you will have something to give to people in need.
text: Ma ya ŋmɛɛrsa, ma gil ŋmɛɛli. Ma la di ma bara wilim ni, chen ni ma zi kotiu a lisi ma kina tuhu ni a suŋi fara tima.

ref: Stop all your dirty talk. Say the right thing at the right time and help others by what you say.
text: Ma ta sɛm nɔ tagna a nyɛ dɔŋ ni, amaa ma nyɛ ma sɛm maga suŋi a kpami ba naa maga la nu a.

ref: Don't make God's Spirit sad. The Spirit makes you sure that someday you will be free from your sins.
text: Ma vɛ tiŋ chenani mu sɛm nan, ma zi chɔk Koosa siim weri ti tuhau. Waa ya Koosa daana ma ni, hali saha naa Koosa zi wa la ma nyuuna a nyɛ ma.

ref: Stop being bitter and angry and mad at others. Don't yell at one another or curse each other or ever be rude.
text: Ma kpa ma paan awa ma tu haasa awa chenani ma tɛsi a la zulimi dɔŋa a la chɔk dɔŋ sɔna a ta.

ref: Do as God does. After all, you are his dear children.
text: Ma ya Koosa bi daŋnɛwa lalaknɔ. Ma kpak unu ma bambe ni di maa chamsi un.

ref: You are God's people, so don't let it be said that any of you are immoral or indecent or greedy.
text: Ma ya Koosa narawa lalaknɔ. O wa deŋli wa maa sɛm dɔŋa sakaal tuma awa doŋ tuma a daŋni ma ya se tima wɛ.

ref: Don't use dirty or foolish or filthy words. Instead, say how thankful you are.
text: O gbanko wa wer di ma sɛm nɔ tagna awa womsi sɛma a kizɔ wa a ni. Maa ka zaami Koosa saha maga.

ref: Being greedy, indecent, or immoral is just another way of worshiping idols. You can be sure people who behave in this way will never be part of the kingdom that belongs to Christ and to God. Living as People of Light
text: Wuti ba naa maga la tum sakaal tuma awa doŋ tuma a la daŋni ba ya se tima wa zi su Koosa awa o be Yesu Kristo koor ti. Se tima chi nibinsa ba naa la nyɛ vursa wa jirimarɛ.

ref: Don't let anyone trick you with foolish talk. God punishes everyone who disobeys him and says foolish things.
text: Ma ta nu nara womsi sɛma a nyɛ ba mur ma. Ba wara tiŋ Koosa nɔ. Chendaha o na paan a du ba ni a zi wa lɛrgi ba diŋsa.

ref: So don't have anything to do with anyone like that.
text: Ma ta lagmi ba naa la sɛm chen ni.

ref: You used to be like people living in the dark, but now you are people of the light because you belong to the Lord. So act like people of the light
text: Ma funɛ vɛ te zim Koosa, ma funɛ nyɛn birsi nee, amaa lalaknɔ ma wa Yesu Kristo ya nibɛgimnɛ, ma nyɛn nha nɛɛ. Chendaha maa tiŋ a chi ba naa nyɛn nha ni chen tiŋ.

ref: But the light will show what these things are really like.
text: chen ni nha zi chaani a niu ka nara zim chenani ba yaa tum.

ref: Light shows up everything, just as the Scriptures say, “Wake up from your sleep and rise from death. Then Christ will shine on you.”
text: Doonani nha nyɛn, birsa wa dugli dooni. Nandigi funɛ ŋɔ, “Ma naa la chɔ birsi ni nan, ma si a li ma sou ni, chen ni Yesu Kristo zi chaani ma niu.”

ref: Act like people with good sense and not like fools.
text: Maa doso ma nyɛni ni. Ma ta tiŋi a chi womna, amaa maa tiŋ a chi ninɛɛgɛ.

ref: These are evil times, so make every minute count.
text: Nidamata tum tum tagniwa lalaknɔ. Ma ka nyini nyinbaan a tum tum were saha maga.

ref: Don't be stupid. Instead, find out what the Lord wants you to do.
text: Ma ta chi womna, amaa ma dɛu chenani Koosa daŋni ma tum a nyɛ un.

ref: Don't destroy yourself by getting drunk, but let the Spirit fill your life.
text: Ma ta nyɛ sin dɔ ma. Ma ka nyɛ Koosa siim weri ti dɔ ma.

ref: When you meet together, sing psalms, hymns, and spiritual songs, as you praise the Lord with all your heart.
text: Maa lɔ boola naa Koosa siim weri ti nyɛ ma aa kipɛgi Koosa ma bambe ni saha maga.

ref: Always use the name of our Lord Jesus Christ to thank God the Father for everything. Wives and Husbands
text: Ma kunyana Koosa tum tum damatau a nyɛ ma. Chendaha maa zaami un saha maga ya kunyan Yesu Kristo sɔn daha. Chenani Baalasa Awa Ba Haanasa Zi Lagmi Nyɛn.

ref: A wife should put her husband first, as she does the Lord.
text: Nihaana, ma la nɔɔni a nyɛ ma baalasi ni a chi chenani ma la nɔɔni a du Koosa ni chen.

ref: A husband is the head of his wife, as Christ is the head and the Savior of the church, which is his own body.
text: Nibaal ya o haan nyuhu tiina, a chi chenani Yesu Kristo ya o nitiŋɛ ta nyuhu tiin chen. O funɛ yisi ba a li ba tum tagna ni chen. Ba waa chi o bara.

ref: Wives should always put their husbands first, as the church puts Christ first.
text: Yesu Kristo nitiŋɛ ta la nɔɔni a nyɛ un. Chen vɛɛna, o lawa nihaana kpa chenani ba tumu a la nɔɔni a nyɛ ba baalasi ni.

ref: A husband should love his wife as much as Christ loved the church and gave his life for it.
text: Nibaala, maa daŋni ma haanasa, a chi chenani Yesu Kristo daŋni ba naa la tiŋ un. Hali o fun sou ba daha.

ref: He made the church holy by the power of his word, and he made it pure by washing it with water.
text: O chi o funɛ kpa nire a chaksi ba a fiisi ba wa Koosa sɛm ni, chen ni ba zi kotiu a tum tum were a nyɛ un.

ref: Christ did this, so he would have a glorious and holy church, without faults or spots or wrinkles or any other flaws.
text: Yesu Kristo funɛ ya chene, di wuzu digi o zi kpa ba naa kpak o jirimau a ya bambi chaan tima a ya niwere a wa Koosa suwachak. O wa zi bu na ba galimsa.

ref: In the same way, a husband should love his wife as much as he loves himself. A husband who loves his wife shows he loves himself.
text: Chenani Yesu Kristo daŋni o nitiŋɛ ta, nibaala gbanko kidaŋni ba haanasa chen. Nibaal kpa haan, ba yaa burgi nibɛgimnɛ. O daŋni o haan, o yaa duuti o titirɛ o daŋni chen.

ref: None of us hate our own bodies. We provide for them and take good care of them, just as Christ does for the church,
text: Nandigi wa ha o titi bara. O daŋni un a kidɛɛsi un. Yesu Kristo gbanko daŋni o nitiŋɛ tau a la dɛɛsi ba.

ref: because we are each part of his body.
text: Ba chi o bara luk pɛksiwa. Chendaha o daŋni ba kinkan chen.

ref: As the Scriptures say, “A man leaves his father and mother to get married, and he becomes like one person with his wife.”
text: Ba fun sɔbi a li Koosa sɛm tɔn ti ni a ŋɔ, “O weru di nibaal gil o nyana awa o niina a kpa haan, chen ni o wa haan ti zi ya nibɛgimu.”

ref: This is a great mystery, but I understand it to mean Christ and his church.
text: Mu zimu di nan bɔmu wa ma zim o mun. O biksi ya di Yesu Kristo awa o nitiŋɛ ta ya nibɛgimnɛ.

ref: So each husband should love his wife as much as he loves himself, and each wife should respect her husband.
text: O gbanko biksi ya di nibaala kidaŋni ba haanasa a chi chenani baa daŋni ba titi ka nihaani ta kinyɛ ba baalasa wa jirima.

ref: Children, you belong to the Lord, and you do the right thing when you obey your parents. The first commandment with a promise says,
text: Bichɛsa, o weru di maa tiŋ ma nyama awa ma numa nɔɔna.

ref: Slaves, you must obey your earthly masters. Show them great respect and be as loyal to them as you are to Christ.
text: Yosa, maa nyɛ ma kunyama wa jirima kinkan aa tiŋ ba nɔɔna ma bambe ni, a chi chenani maa tiŋ Yesu Kristo.

ref: Try to please them at all times, and not just when you think they are watching. You are slaves of Christ, so with your whole heart you must do what God wants you to do.
text: Yosi bɔnɛ yaa tum kinkannɛ a li ba kunyan se ni. O wa kaali, ba gil. Ma ta tum a chi ba. Ma lisi di Yesu Kristo dɔ ma lalaknɔ. Ma kpak un ma bambe ni aa tum chenani o daŋni maa tum saha maga.

ref: Gladly serve your masters, as though they were the Lord himself, and not simply people.
text: Maa tum ma tuma awa tu sɔɔni, domi ma wa tum a nyɛ nibinsa duŋduŋnɛ. Ma tum aa nyɛ Yesu Kristo nee.

ref: You know that you will be rewarded for any good things you do, whether you are slaves or free.
text: Ma zimu di ma ya nibin hiise akoo ma ya yosa a tum tum were a nyɛ un, o zi wa bɔ ma chimu.

ref: Slave owners, you must treat your slaves with this same respect. Don't threaten them. They have the same Master in heaven that you do, and he doesn't have favorites. The Fight against Evil
text: Kunyama, ma lisi di ma wa ma yosa kpak kunyana bɛgimnɛ ka o nyɛn Koosa tɔhɔn ti ni. Chendaha o lawa ma dɛɛsi ba nɛnɛ a ta hɔɔsi ba. Koosa wara daŋni bɔnɛ a kaali bɔnɛ. Ma Kpa Koosa Kpok A Nyaŋi Sintana

ref: Finally, let the mighty strength of the Lord make you strong.
text: Domi ma wa ya kunyan ti ya nibɛgimnɛ, ma waa kotee a na kpok a li o kpok zen ti ni.

ref: Put on all the armor that God gives, so you can defend yourself against the devil's tricks.
text: Ma nyini o kpok naa Koosa fun kpa nyɛ ma se ni, sintana wa zi koti a wa mur ma.

ref: We are not fighting against humans. We are fighting against forces and authorities and against rulers of darkness and powers in the spiritual world.
text: Ya wara daŋni ya kpa Koosa kpok nɔ a chem nara. Ya ka daŋni un ya la chem siim kpoka awa kpok damata a naa la tum tum tagna kinkan awa ba naa maga vɛ zim Koosa a nyɛn buudaha ni.

ref: So put on all the armor that God gives. Then when that evil day comes, you will be able to defend yourself. And when the battle is over, you will still be standing firm.
text: Ma kpak Koosa kpok ti nɛnɛ, chen ni sintana wa wa di o wa kpak ma, ma zi koti a nyaŋi unu hali o wa peti.

ref: Be ready! Let the truth be like a belt around your waist, and let God's justice protect you like armor.
text: Maa il. Maa sɛm dɔŋa awa wuti a kitum tum were,

ref: Your desire to tell the good news about peace should be like shoes on your feet.
text: a kisaksi aa ŋɔ nara ni Koosa laaboor weri ti wɛ saha maga. Ba nu un, Koosa zi nyɛ ba bara sɔɔnau.

ref: Let your faith be like a shield, and you will be able to stop all the flaming arrows of the evil one.
text: Ma nyɛ ma se su Koosa kinkan saha maga, chen ni sintana wa wa, o wa zi koti a namsi ma.

ref: Let God's saving power be like a helmet, and for a sword use God's message that comes from the Spirit.
text: Koosa funɛ a yisi mau a li ma tum tagna ni maa tiŋ un. Maa kpak chen nɛnɛ, a nyɛ o siim weri ti suŋi ma maa sɛm o sɛma. A waa la zi nyɛ ma nyaŋi ma dɔma.

ref: Never stop praying, especially for others. Always pray by the power of the Spirit. Stay alert and keep praying for God's people.
text: Maa sumi Koosa kin nama daha saha maga, chen ni o zi suŋi mau. Ma nyɛ o siim weri ti kibiksi ma chenani ma zi sumi Koosa. Ma il nɛnɛ awa kanyita kinkan ni, aa kisumi un di o suŋi o nara maga.

ref: Pray that I will be given the message to speak and that I may fearlessly explain the mystery about the good news.
text: Ma gbanko kisumi Koosa mu daha, di o nyɛ mu bambi kpok mu biksi nidamata o laaboor weri ti wɛ. O laaboor weri nɔwa, o fun kpa sogli hali wa zinan o kpa un a li gbampulim ni.

ref: I was sent to do this work, and this is the reason I am in jail. So pray that I will be brave and will speak as I should. Final Greetings
text: Hali ba fun kpak min a tɔ dɛ, mu ha vɛɛn ya Koosa laaboor weri ti nitumirɛ. O deŋlu wa mu kpak bambi a biksi ba naa nyɛn bar nɔ o wɛ a ta kpa kundɔŋ a ta gantɛl ni. Pɔɔl Mak O Tɔn Nɔ Bar Nɔwa

ref: I pray that God the Father and the Lord Jesus Christ will give peace, love, and faith to every follower!
text: Ya kunyan Koosa awa ya kunyan Yesu Kristo zi suŋi mau awa ma dɔŋtima maga di ma se su ba nɛnɛ, chen ni ma zi kpak nɔ bɛgimu a kidaŋni dɔŋa kinkan.

ref: May God be kind to everyone who keeps on loving our Lord Jesus Christ.
text: Koosa suŋi ba naa maga la daŋni ya kunyan Yesu Kristo awa daŋni naa vɛ kpak bɔ ni.

ref: From Paul and Timothy, servants of Christ Jesus. To all God's people who belong to Christ Jesus at Philippi and to all your bishops and deacons.
text: Min waa, Pɔɔl, la sɔbi tɔn nɔ a nyɛ ma. Mu wa Timoti ya naa ya Yesu Kristo tumtumsa zaami ma naa ya Koosa nara awa ma nihɛɛta awa ma nisuŋɛ a li Filipai ni. Ma wa Yesu Kristo ya nibɛgimnɛ.

ref: I pray that God our Father and the Lord Jesus Christ will be kind to you and will bless you with peace! Paul's Prayer for the Church in Philippi
text: Ya kunyana Koosa awa ya kunyan Yesu Kristo kisuŋi ma a kinyɛ ma bara sɔɔna. Pɔɔl Fun Sumi Koosa A Nyɛ Ba

ref: Every time I think of you, I thank my God.
text: Mu yaa lisi ma wɛu a la zaami Koosa ma daha.

ref: And whenever I mention you in my prayers, it makes me happy.
text: Muu sumi un ma daha, mu tuha sɔɔniu kinkan.

ref: This is because you have taken part with me in spreading the good news from the first day you heard about it.
text: Domi saha naa ma fun nu Koosa laaboor weri ti hali wa zinan, ma yaa suŋi minu di mu ŋɔ nara ni o wɛ.

ref: God is the one who began this good work in you, and I am certain that he won't stop before it is complete on the day that Christ Jesus returns.
text: Mu kpak bambi di Yesu Kristo wa bur wa, Koosa zi wa peti tum naa o fun piin a tum ma niu.

ref: You have a special place in my heart. So it is only natural for me to feel the way I do. All of you have helped in the work God has given me, as I defend the good news and tell about it here in jail.
text: Mu daŋni mau kinkan. Chendaha o weru wa mu lisi ma wɛ nan saha maga. Ba kpak min a tɔ dɛ koo mu chiŋɛ Koosa laaboor weri ti gantɛl ni a sɛm nara ni di o kpak wutiu, Koosa yaa funɛ suŋi minu awa ma maga.

ref: God himself knows how much I want to see you. He knows I care for you in the same way Christ Jesus does.
text: Koosa ya mu sɛhɛra tiina di Yesu Kristo kpa o daŋni a nyɛ min mu daŋni ma kinkan.

ref: I pray that your love will keep on growing and you will fully know and understand
text: Nannɛ muu sumi Koosa ma daha. Mu sumi unu di ma zi wa zim unu wuti ni a kidaŋni dɔŋa kinkan aa gbaari,

ref: how to make the right choices. Then you will still be pure and innocent when Christ returns. And until that day,
text: chen ni saha maga ma zi kotiu a zim a lisi nyinbaan weri. Ma ya chen, Kristo wa bur wa, ma zi kotiu a chem un wa tu chaani a ta kpak galimsa.

ref: Jesus Christ will keep you busy doing good deeds that bring glory and praise to God. What Life Means to Paul
text: Yesu Kristo zi suŋi mau di ma ya nibin werewa kinkan a chi chen. Nara zi na mau a kidaŋni ba pɛgi Koosa a nyɛ un jirima. Kristo Ya Pɔɔl Nyɛni Nyuha.

ref: My dear friends, I want you to know that what has happened to me has helped to spread the good news.
text: Mu niinbisa, mu daŋni mu ŋɔ mau chenani ba fun kpak min a tɔ dɛ chen nyɛ Koosa laaboor weri ti pisiu a gbaari.

ref: The Roman guards and all the others know I am here in jail because I serve Christ.
text: Koor nyuhu tiina Siiza lanjimasa ba naa maga la il min awa nidamata a nyɛn bar nɔ, zimu di ba funɛ tɔ min dɛrɛ muu tiŋ Kristo daha.

ref: Now most of the Lord's followers have become brave and are fearlessly telling the message.
text: Nan daha, Yesu nitiŋɛ nidamata kpak bambe kpok a gbaari a biksi nara Koosa laaboor weri ti wɛ.

ref: Some are preaching about Christ because they are jealous and envious of us. Others are preaching because they want to help.
text: Nara bɔnɛ ba naa kpak handɔta min ni, ba biksi narawa Kristo wɛ. Bɔnɛ ka biksi o wɛ a suŋi min.

ref: They love Christ and know I am here to defend the good news about him.
text: Ba waa la daŋni min aa zim di Koosa funɛ kpa min a du bar nɔ, chen ni mu zi chiŋi o laaboor weri ti gantɛl niu.

ref: But the ones who are jealous of us are not sincere. They just want to cause trouble for me while I am in jail.
text: Ba naa kpak handɔta min ni, ba biksi narawa Kristo wɛ awa ba nyina nɛɛ. Ba ya se timwa a daŋni ba gbaari mu namsi ni a li dɛ nɔ ni.

ref: But that doesn't matter. All that matters is that people are telling about Christ, whether they are sincere or not. This is what makes me glad. I will keep on being glad,
text: Amaa o magu. Bɔnɛ biksi nara Kristo wɛ a li ba bambe nee, bɔnɛ ka biksi ba a li ba nyina ni. Kristo wɛwa ba maga biksi. Chendaha mu tuha sɔɔnɛu.

ref: because I know that your prayers and the help that comes from the Spirit of Christ Jesus will keep me safe.
text: Maa sumi Koosarɛ mu daha ka Yesu Kristo siim weri ti kisuŋi min. Chendaha mu zimu di ba zi wa yisi minu a li dɛ nɔ ni. Kin nama daha, mu tuha gbanko sɔɔni kinkan aa la.

ref: I honestly expect and hope I will never do anything to be ashamed of. Whether I live or die, I always want to be as brave as I am now and bring honor to Christ.
text: Mu kpak miisa koo mu siwɛɛ, mu se sɛrɛu lalaknɔ ka mu kpak bambi bɛgim Kristo ni, chen ni mu wa zi na hiisa a kpak bambi kpok kinkan. Mu ya chen, mu zi kpa mu barau a nyɛ un jirima kinkan a chi chenani mu ya nyɛ un jirima chen.

ref: If I live, it will be for Christ, and if I die, I will gain even more.
text: Mu nyɛni mun ya baŋa? O mun ya Kristo. Mu sowɛɛ, mu wa un zi nyɛnu. Chen bɔɛɛ.

ref: I don't know what to choose. I could keep on living and doing something useful.
text: Amaa mu kpak miisa, mu zi kotiu a tum tum were a gbaari a nyɛ un. Mu wa zim chenani mu zi lisi.

ref: It is a hard choice to make. I want to die and be with Christ, because this would be much better.
text: A muksi minu mu bambi ni kinkan. Mu daŋni kinkan di mu sou a la nyɛn Kristo wati. Mu ya chen, waa kaali wa mu nyɛn bar nɔ.

ref: But I know that all of you still need me. This is why I am sure I will stay on to help you grow and be happy in your faith.
text: Mu kpak bambi kin nama wɛ ni. Chendaha mu zim di mu zi nyɛn bar nɔu a koti a suŋi ma se su un a gbaari ka ma tusa sɔɔni kinkan.

ref: Then, when I visit you again, you will have good reason to take great pride in Christ Jesus because of me.
text: Ma wa min bu wa lagmi dɔŋ ni, min la zi ya ma jirima tiina, chen ni ma zi pɛgi Yesu Kristou kinkan mu daha.

ref: Above all else, you must live in a way that brings honor to the good news about Christ. Then, whether I visit you or not, I will hear that all of you think alike. I will know that you are working together and are struggling side by side to get others to believe the good news.
text: Ma zim chenani o deŋliu wa maa tiŋ un. Maa tiŋ chen, chen ni mu wa wa ma wati lalaga koo mu vusu a nu ma wɛ, mu zi zimu di ma kpak nɔ bɛgimu wa dɔŋ ni a kpak nɛnɛ, a kpak un ma bambe ni kinkan di ma biksi nara Koosa laaboor weri naa nyɛ ba se su un wɛ.

ref: Be brave when you face your enemies. Your courage will show them that they are going to be destroyed, and it will show you that you will be saved. God will make all of this happen,
text: Ma ta ɔm ma dɔma hali tama. Nan la zi biksi ba di Koosa titi zi wa na ba galimsau a ta ba yɔri, a biksi ma di o zi yisi mau a li ma tum tagna ni hali o wa peti.

ref: and he has blessed you. Not only do you have faith in Christ, but you suffer for him.
text: Waa nyɛ ma se su Kristo a nyɛ ma gbanko namsi o daha.

ref: You saw me suffer, and you still hear about my troubles. Now you must suffer in the same way.
text: Mu funɛ nyɛn ma wati, ma funɛ na chenani mu namsiu. Lalaknɔ ma nu chenani mu ha vɛɛn a namsiu. Ma titi gbanko namsiu chen ni.

ref: Christ encourages you, and his love comforts you. God's Spirit unites you, and you are concerned for others.
text: Ma naa la tiŋ Kristo nan o kpami mauu? Chenani oo daŋni ma belimi mauu? Ma wa Koosa siim weri ti ya nɔ bɛgimuu? Maa daŋni dɔŋa a kpak siki wa dɔŋ niuu?

ref: Now make me completely happy! Live in harmony by showing love for each other. Be united in what you think, as if you were only one person.
text: Kin nama ya chen, ma nyɛ ma lise ya kibɛgim, chen ni mu tuha zi sɔɔniu hali o wa peti. Ma gbanko kpak nɔ bɛgim a kidaŋni dɔŋa saha maga.

ref: Don't be jealous or proud, but be humble and consider others more important than yourselves.
text: Ma ta ya se tima a kidaŋni sɔna. Ma ta lisi di ma ya nibin werewa a kaali ma dɔŋtima. Ma ka ya jɛrgɛ tima.

ref: Care about them as much as you care about yourselves
text: Ma ta nyini ma titi kina duŋduŋ, amaa ma nyini ma dɔŋtima kina wɛ gbanko.

ref: and think the same way that Christ Jesus thought:
text: O lawa maa lisi a chi chenani Yesu Kristo funɛ lisi.

ref: Christ was truly God. But he did not try to remain equal with God.
text: O du chenani Koosa durɛ saha maga, amaa o wa fun saksi di o kpak un kpok.

ref: Instead he gave up everything and became a slave, when he became like one of us.
text: O fun kpa chenani o du a ta gantɛl ni a kaali a wa burgi chenani nibinsa du.

ref: Christ was humble. He obeyed God and even died on a cross.
text: O funɛ ya jɛrgɛ tiinnɛ a la tiŋ Koosa nɔ a sou. Hali o fun sou a li daakakli ni.

ref: Then God gave Christ the highest place and honored his name above all others.
text: Chendaha Koosa fun zer un buudaha a nyɛ un sɔn naa zenee a kaali sɔna maga,

ref: So at the name of Jesus everyone will bow down, those in heaven, on earth, and under the earth.
text: chen ni ba naa maga Koosa fun naami ka ba nyɛn bawu maga ni zi wa gbiri o suwachak niu a nyɛ un jirima.

ref: And to the glory of God the Father everyone will openly agree, “Jesus Christ is Lord!” Lights in the World
text: Ba maga zi wa ŋɔ gbampulim niu di Yesu Kristo ya ba kunyan ti. Chen la zi nyɛ o nyana Koosa jirimau. Ma Tu Chaana Chi Wuliwa A Li Buudaha Ni

ref: My dear friends, you always obeyed when I was with you. Now that I am away, you should obey even more. So work with fear and trembling to discover what it really means to be saved.
text: Mu bi daŋnɛ, mu funɛ nyɛn ma wati, ma funɛ tiŋ mu nɔu. Lalaknɔwa mu vɛ nyɛn ma wati, waa ya kibirigi wa ma ha vɛɛn tiŋ mu sɛm ta nɛnɛ. Saha maga maa nyɛ Koosa wa jirima kinkan aa kitum chenani deŋlee a chi ba naa Koosa yisi a li ba tum tagna ni.

ref: God is working in you to make you willing and able to obey him.
text: Saha maga Koosa yaa tum ma bambe niu, chen ni ma zi zim chenani o daŋni ma tumu.

ref: Then you will be the pure and innocent children of God. You live among people who are crooked and evil, but you must not do anything they can say is wrong. Try to shine as lights among the people of this world,
text: Ma waa ya o bisa a kpak tu chaana a vɛ kpak galimsa. Ba naa ya nusun tima a la tum tum tagna kinkan, nyɛnu a go ma. Ma chaani ba bambaan ni a chi wula chaani buudaha ni,

ref: as you hold firmly to the message that gives life. Then on the day when Christ returns, I can take pride in you. I can also know that my work and efforts were not useless.
text: aa kibiksi ba chenani Koosa daŋni o kpa o mi fali ti a nyɛ ba. Maa tum nan, ka Kristo wa bur wa, ma zi ya mu jirima narau. Mu tum nama maga mu tum a nyɛ ma nan, a wa zi ya yɔri.

ref: Your faith in the Lord and your service are like a sacrifice offered to him. And my own blood may have to be poured out with the sacrifice. If this happens, I will be glad and rejoice with you.
text: Ma se su Koosa ma tum a nyɛ un chen, chi chenani Ju tim ta fun kpa sela a kɔɔri kɔɔra a nyɛ un chene. Ba kpu min, mu tuha zi sɔɔniu.

ref: In the same way, you should be glad and rejoice with me. Timothy and Epaphroditus
text: O lawa mu wa ma gbanko tusa sɔɔniu. Timoti Awa Ɛpafrodaitus Baga Nyɛn Ma Ni

ref: I want to be encouraged by news about you. So I hope the Lord Jesus will soon let me send Timothy to you.
text: Ya kunyana Yesu Kristo nyɛ min bambi bɛgim mu tum Timoti ma wati lalaga, chen ni o wa bur wa, o zi kpami minu wa ma laaboora ni.

ref: I don't have anyone else who cares about you as much as he does.
text: O duŋduŋ nyɛn mu wati bar nɔ a bɔni chenani mu baga nyɛn ma ni.

ref: The others think only about what interests them and not about what concerns Christ Jesus.
text: Ba naa kaɛɛ bar nɔ, ba baga nyɛn ba titi kinnɛɛ. Ba baga wa to Yesu Kristo kina ni.

ref: But you know what kind of person Timothy is. He has worked with me like a son in spreading the good news.
text: Ma zim chenani Timoti bambi du awa chenani mu wa un fun tum a chi nyana awa o be a biksi nara Koosa laaboor weri ti wɛ.

ref: I hope to send him to you, as soon as I find out what is going to happen to me.
text: Mu wa zim chenani kina zi du min ni, mu zi tum unu ma wati.

ref: And I feel sure the Lord will also let me come soon.
text: Ya kunyan ti la nyɛ min bambi bɛgim di mu titi zi kotiu a wa na ma lalaga.

ref: I think I ought to send my dear friend Epaphroditus back to you. He is a follower and a worker and a soldier of the Lord, just as I am. You sent him to look after me,
text: Mu lisi di o deŋlu di mu tum ya niinbe Ɛpafrodaitus ma wati lalaknɔ. Ma funɛ tum unu di o wa suŋi min. O funɛ kpaŋi o titiu kinkan di o wa min kitum bar nɔ nɛnɛ.

ref: but now he is eager to see you. He is worried, because you heard he was sick.
text: O kpak unu o bambi ni kinkan di o wa na ma maga. O baga funɛ nyɛnu di ma nu di o bara wa fun lɛm.

ref: In fact, he was very sick and almost died. But God was kind to him, and also to me, and he kept me from being burdened down with sorrow.
text: O ya wutirɛ di o bara wa fun lɛm ka o daŋni o sou, amaa Koosa funɛ kpak un sikiu o na alaafɛ. Koosa funɛ kpak min gbanko wa sikiu, domi o fu siwɛɛ, mu tuha fu zi chɔku a gbaari.

ref: Now I am more eager than ever to send Epaphroditus back again. You will be glad to see him, and I won't have to worry any longer.
text: Chendaha mu kpak un mu bambi ni a tum un ma wati lalaga. Ma na un, ma tusa zi sɔɔniu ka chenani maa tiŋ wa zi bu muksi min kinkan.

ref: Be sure to give him a cheerful welcome, just as people who serve the Lord deserve.
text: O wa pu ma, ma la un a du wa tu sɔɔni ya kunyan ti daha. Ma nyɛ ba naa maga chi un wa jirima.

ref: He almost died working for Christ, and he risked his own life to do for me what you could not.
text: Waa chiŋi ma bar chiŋɛ ni a tum tuma a nyɛ Kristo ni a suŋi min. Hali o fun la zu bar tagna ni a daŋni o sou.

ref: Finally, my dear friends, be glad that you belong to the Lord. It doesn't bother me to write the same things to you that I have written before. In fact, it is for your own good.
text: Mu niinbisa, ma nyɛ ma tusa sɔɔni ya kunyan ti daha. Mu daŋni mu ŋɔ ma wu digirɛ. Mu funɛ te sɔbiu o wɛu a nyɛ ma a bura sɔbi nan. O zi suŋi mau ma ta cheli. Chendaha ma tuha sɔɔni di mu ya chen.

ref: Watch out for those people who behave like dogs! They are evil and want to do more than just circumcise you.
text: Ma doso kinkan ba naa funɛ teŋsi ba titi bara a la tum tum tagna a la daŋni ba teŋsi ma gbanko chen. Ba chi vasa a naa ya yɔrirɛ a gba a tum tum tagniwa.

ref: But we are the ones who are truly circumcised, because we worship by the power of God's Spirit and take pride in Christ Jesus. We don't brag about what we have done,
text: Ba teŋsi ti wa ya wuti. Koosa wara daŋni ya teŋsi ya bara, domi o funɛ kpa o siim weri tirɛ a nyɛ ya, chen ni ya zi kotiu a jɛɛmi un wa wuti ni. Lalaknɔ Yesu Kristo ya ya jirima tiina. Ya wa bu kpak wu digi a li chenani nara tum tuma li ba titi kpok ni.

ref: although I could. Others may brag about themselves, but I have more reason to brag than anyone else.
text: Nandigi kote a kpak wu digi a li chenani nara tum tuma a li ba titi kpok ni, mu zi kaali ba magau.

ref: I was circumcised when I was eight days old, and I am from the nation of Israel and the tribe of Benjamin. I am a true Hebrew. As a Pharisee, I strictly obeyed the Law of Moses.
text: Ju tim ta funɛ lul min a li Bɛnjamin lul nɛɛ. Mu ya Ju narrɛ wuti ni. Mu funɛ ya wuzu bunɔpɛ, ba fun a teŋ min. Mu fun wa bi a burgi Farisi tim nidigi. Ba waa la tiŋ Koosa chiksɛ ta nɛnɛ.

ref: And I was so eager I even made trouble for the church. I did everything the Law demands in order to please God.
text: Nandigi wa zi koti a ŋɔ di mu funɛ chɔk au. Mu se funɛ sɛriu hali mu muksi ba naa tiŋ Yesu kinkan.

ref: But Christ has shown me that what I once thought was valuable is worthless.
text: Saha digi mu funɛ lisiu di kin nama ya mu nyɔɔrrɛ, amaa lalaknɔwa mu zim Kristo, mu zimu di a ya yɔrirɛ.

ref: Nothing is as wonderful as knowing Christ Jesus my Lord. I have given up everything else and count it all as garbage. All I want is Christ
text: Chenani mu fun tiŋ saha digi, lalaknɔ mu lisu di a chi chaasiwa. Nibine zim ya kunyana Yesu Kristo, chen kaali a nama maga kinkan. Chendaha muu daŋni mu zim di Kristo ya mu nyɔɔra.

ref: and to know that I belong to him. I could not make myself acceptable to God by obeying the Law of Moses. God accepted me simply because of my faith in Christ.
text: Mu daŋni di o wa min zi burgi nibɛgimnɛ hali o wa peti. Mu funɛ tiŋ Koosa chiksɛ ta, o ha funɛ vɛɛn na mu galimsau. Lalaknɔ mu si su Kristo, Koosa wa bu na mu galimsa.

ref: I have not yet reached my goal, and I am not perfect. But Christ has taken hold of me. So I keep on running and struggling to take hold of the prize.
text: Mu wara sɛm di mu piin na kin nama magau. Mu ha wa ya nibin weri a peti. Kristo dɔ min lalaknɔ. Chendaha mu kpaŋi mu titiu kinkan di mu zi wa dɔ kin namau.

ref: My friends, I don't feel I have already arrived. But I forget what is behind, and I struggle for what is ahead.
text: Mu niinbisa, mu ha wa lisi di mu dɔ kin nama. Mu kpa mu bambi a du wu bɛgim nɛɛ. Mu suglɛ wuzuna naa kaali chenu aa kpak un mu bambi ni a na kin nawara nyɛn mu suwachak ni.

ref: I run toward the goal, so I can win the prize of being called to heaven. This is the prize God offers because of what Christ Jesus has done.
text: Koosa funɛ yir min di mu wa lagmi Yesu Kristo ni a nyɛn o tɔhɔn ti ni wuzu digi. Chendaha mu kpaŋi mu titi di mu ya chen.

ref: All of us who are mature should think in this same way. And if any of you think differently, God will make it clear to you.
text: Ya naa maga la tiŋ Kristo aa kpak un nɛnɛ, ya maga kilisi chen. Ma bɔnɛ vɛ la nɔɔni chenani mu sɔbi chen, Koosa zi suŋi mau ma zim chenani mu biksi ma.

ref: But we must keep going in the direction that we are now headed.
text: Ma nyɛ yaa tiŋ chenani ya piinsa tiŋ hali wa zinan.

ref: My friends, I want you to follow my example and learn from others who closely follow the example we set for you.
text: Mu niinbisa, o lawa ma zer mu ninu a li chenani mu tiŋ Kristo ni. Ya waa funɛ biksi ma nɛnɛ. Maa nyini ba naa la tiŋ ya biksi ti.

ref: I often warned you that many people are living as enemies of the cross of Christ. And now with tears in my eyes, I warn you again
text: Mu funɛ ŋɔ mau bu damata di nidamata vɛ Kristo daakakli biksi ti. Lalaknɔ mu bura ŋɔ mau awa siini ni.

ref: that they are headed for hell! They worship their stomachs and brag about the disgusting things they do. All they can think about are the things of this world.
text: Ba titi daŋnɛ kaali kina maga. Ba zer ba titi a li ba tum tagna naa nyɛ ba na hiisarɛ daha. Baa lisi tɛɛnɛ nɔ maga kina duŋduŋnɛ. Kin nama daha, Koosa zi wa chɔk bau.

ref: But we are citizens of heaven and are eagerly waiting for our Savior to come from there. Our Lord Jesus Christ
text: Ya waa ka ya Koosa tɔhɔn ti nara. O nyɛn ya bambe niu di ya pɔ ya kunyan Yesu Kristo naa funɛ yisi ya a li ya tum tagna ni ya tiŋ un, o wa bur a li dooni a wa.

ref: Dear friends, I love you and long to see you. Please keep on being faithful to the Lord. You are my pride and joy. Paul Encourages the Lord's Followers
text: Mu niinbisa, mu yaa daŋni mau kinkan. Ma waa ya mu jirima nara aa nyɛ mu tuha sɔɔni saha maga. Mu bi daŋnɛ, mu daŋni mu ŋɔ mau chenani ma zi tiŋ ya kunyan, chen ni ma zi kpak unu nɛnɛ.

ref: Euodia and Syntyche, you belong to the Lord, so I beg you to stop arguing with each other.
text: Mu sumi ya toosau Yuodia awa Sintaiki ba naa la tiŋ ya kunyan ti, di ba la nɔɔni wa dɔŋa.

ref: And, my true partner, I ask you to help them. These women have worked together with me and with Clement and with the others in spreading the good news. Their names are now written in the book of life.
text: Nihaana nama awa Klɛmɛnt wa tumtumsa bɔnɛ wa min, ya waa funɛ tum kinkan di ya biksi nara tima Koosa laaboor weri ti wɛ. Mu dɔŋtiin birigi naa wa min la tum Kristo tuma, mu sumi hinu di i suŋi ba. Koosa fun sɔbi ba naa la o mi fali ti, sɔna a du o tɔn ni. Ba sɔna nyɛn dooni.

ref: Always be glad because of the Lord! I will say it again: Be glad.
text: Ma nyɛ ma tusa sɔɔni saha maga ya kunyan ti daha. Mu zi bukoo nɔ mau, ma nyɛ ma tusa sɔɔni.

ref: Always be gentle with others. The Lord will soon be here.
text: O zi wa bur wa lalagau. Chendaha o lawa ma ya jɛrgɛu nara wati.

ref: Don't worry about anything, but pray about everything. With thankful hearts offer up your prayers and requests to God.
text: Ma ta nyɛ wu digi kimuksi ma, amaa maa zaami Koosa a kisumi un di o kpa kin naa maga ma daŋni a nyɛ ma.

ref: Then, because you belong to Christ Jesus, God will bless you with peace that no one can completely understand. And this peace will control the way you think and feel.
text: Koosa nyɛ ma bara sɔɔni kinkan. Chen zi nyɛn ma bambe awa ma lise niu domi ma wa Yesu Kristo ya nibɛgimnɛ. Chenani o ya chen kaali chenani ya zim.

ref: Finally, my friends, keep your minds on whatever is true, pure, right, holy, friendly, and proper. Don't ever stop thinking about what is truly worthwhile and worthy of praise.
text: Mu niinbisa, ma nyɛ mu lagmi a nama maga a ŋɔ ma. Ma yaa lisi kin naa ya wuti a kpak jirima a deŋli a chaani a wer. Kin nawara nara pɛgi, maa lisi a wɛ.

ref: You know the teachings I gave you, and you know what you heard me say and saw me do. So follow my example. And God, who gives peace, will be with you. Paul Gives Thanks for the Gifts He Was Given
text: Mu funɛ nyɛn ma wati, ma fun a nu mu biksi ti a na mu tuma. Maa lisi mu biksi ti wɛ aa kitum ma tuma a chi min. Ma ya nan, Koosa zi sɔɔni ma barau kinkan a nyɛn ma wati. Pɔɔl Fun Zaami Ba Ba Papaha Ti Daha

ref: The Lord has made me very grateful that at last you have thought about me once again. Actually, you were thinking about me all along, but you didn't have any chance to show it.
text: Ya kunyan ti funɛ nyɛ mu tuha sɔɔniu kinkan, domi ma funɛ bu biksi minu chenani ma baga nyɛn min ni. Saha digi ma funɛ kotiu a suŋi min a chi nan, amaa ma wa bu a na nyinbaan a suŋi min hali wa zinan.

ref: I am not complaining about having too little. I have learned to be satisfied with whatever I have.
text: Mu wara sɛmu di kina pɔɔgi min. Chenani maga mu fun a du, mu funɛ na di kin nawara mu kpak chen mak minu.

ref: I know what it is to be poor or to have plenty, and I have lived under all kinds of conditions. I know what it means to be full or to be hungry, to have too much or too little.
text: Mu zim chenani a fun pɔɔgi minu awa chenani mu ya kin tiina. Mu zim chenani lɔsa fun kpak minu awa chenani mu di diwe a puŋu. Kin naa maga ya min mu zim di a mak minu.

ref: Christ gives me the strength to face anything.
text: Kristo kpak o kpok ti a nyɛ min, chen ni mu zi a chem kina magau.

ref: It was good of you to help me when I was having such a hard time.
text: O funɛ weru kinkan ma suŋi min a li mu namsi ni a chi nan.

ref: My friends at Philippi, you remember what it was like when I started preaching the good news in Macedonia. After I left there, you were the only church that became my partner by giving blessings and by receiving them in return.
text: Ma Filipai nara, ma zimu nɛnɛ di mu funɛ te a biksi Masɛdonia nara Koosa laaboor weri ti wɛ a la saksi di mu kaali, ma duŋduŋ funɛ suŋi min nyinbaan ni.

ref: Even when I was in Thessalonica, you helped me more than once.
text: Mu funɛ nyɛn Tɛsalɔnika ni a daŋni kina, wuzu bilɛ bambaan ni ma fun kpa papaha a wa nyɛ min.

ref: I am not trying to get something from you, but I want you to receive the blessings that come from giving.
text: Mu wara daŋni ma papaha duŋduŋnɛ. Mu daŋni chenani ma zi ya a sɔɔni Koosa tuharɛ.

ref: I have been paid back everything, and with interest. I am completely satisfied with the gifts you sent with Epaphroditus. They are like a sweet-smelling offering or like the right kind of sacrifice that pleases God.
text: Ma papaha naa Ɛpafrodaitus fun kpa li ma wati, a mak chenani mu daŋni a kaali. Chenani ma fun ya nyɛ Koosa tuha sɔɔni kinkan. O chi Ju tim ta funɛ kpa sela a kɔɔri kɔɔra a nyɛ Koosa ni saha digi chene.

ref: I pray that God will take care of all your needs with the wonderful blessings that come from Christ Jesus!
text: Ma daŋni kundɔŋ, o zi lisi au a li o kidamata a naa o kpak a li Kristo ni, a suŋi ma.

ref: May God our Father be praised forever and ever. Amen. Final Greetings
text: Koosa naa ya ya kunyana, kpak jirima kinkan hali saha naa vɛ kpak bɔ. Ami. Pɔɔl Mak Tɔn Nɔ Bar Nɔwa

ref: Give my greetings to all who are God's people because of Christ Jesus. The Lord's followers here with me send you their greetings.
text: Mu zaami Koosa narau ba naa wa Kristo ya nibɛgimnɛ. Ya dɔŋtima ba naa wa min nyɛn bar nɔ, gbanko zaami mau.

ref: All of God's people send their greetings, especially those in the service of the Emperor.
text: Koosa nara ba naa nyɛn tɔhɔn nɔ ni, zaami mau. Ba naa maga la tum koorsi ta nyuhu tiina Siiza dam zen ni zaami mau kinkan.

ref: From Paul, chosen by God to be an apostle of Christ Jesus, and from Timothy, who is also a follower.
text: Min, Pɔɔl, naa Koosa fun lisi di mu burgi Yesu Kristo nitumi, la sɔbi tɔn nɔ a nyɛ ma.

ref: To God's people who live in Colossae and are faithful followers of Christ. I pray that God our Father will be kind to you and will bless you with peace! A Prayer of Thanks
text: Mu wa ya niinbe, Timoti, zaami ya dɔŋtima ma naa ya Koosa nara a li Kɔlɔsɛ ni aa tiŋ Kristo nɛnɛ. Ya kunyan Koosa kisuŋi ma a kinyɛ ma bara sɔɔna. Pɔɔl Fun Zaami Koosa Ba Daha

ref: Each time we pray for you, we thank God, the Father of our Lord Jesus Christ.
text: Saha maga ya yaa sumi Koosau a nyɛ ma. Waa ya ya kunyan Yesu Kristo ti nyana. Saha maga ya yaa zaami unu kinkan.

ref: We have heard of your faith in Christ and of your love for all God's people,
text: Ya funɛ nuu di ma se su Yesu Kristo a la daŋni Koosa nara nɛnɛ. Chendaha yaa zaami un chen.

ref: because what you hope for is kept safe for you in heaven. You first heard about this hope when you believed the true message, which is the good news.
text: Ma funɛ te nu Koosa laaboor weri naa ya wuti, Ɛpafras fun biksi ma di ma kpak bambi bɛgim di wuzu digi Koosa zi wa kpa kiwere naa o fun kpa chiŋsi o tɔhɔn ti ni chenu a nyɛ ma. Chendaha ma se su Yesu ka maa daŋni nara kinkan.

ref: The good news is spreading all over the world with great success. It has spread in this same way among you, ever since the first day you learned the truth about God's wonderful kindness
text: Koosa laaboor were tirɛ ba kpa a mɔɔli bar damata ni a gbaari. Nara kinkan se funɛ su Koosa, ba bur a tum tum were o daha. Saha naa ma se fun te lɛli a zim di Koosa funɛ suŋi mau, o gbanko fun nyɛ ma se su un, chen ni ma zi tum tum wereu.

ref: from our good friend Epaphras. He works together with us for Christ and is a faithful worker for you.
text: Ɛpafras funɛ biksi ma laaboor weri ti. O wa ya waa ya Kristo tumtumsa. Oo tum Kristo tumwa wa wuti ni a nyɛ ya. Yaa daŋni unu kinkan.

ref: He is also the one who told us about the love that God's Spirit has given you. The Person and Work of Christ
text: Waa funɛ sɛm ya chenani Koosa siim weri ti suŋi ma di maa daŋni Koosa nara.

ref: We have not stopped praying for you since the first day we heard about you. In fact, we always pray that God will show you everything he wants you to do and that you may have all the wisdom and understanding his Spirit gives.
text: O funɛ sɛm ya ma wɛ, ya yaa sumi Koosau aa nyɛ ma di o zi nyɛ ma wa zim o wɛu nɛnɛ a lɛli ma se di ma zim o tutɔ ti, a kpa o zima a nyɛ ma.

ref: Then you will live a life that honors the Lord, and you will always please him by doing good deeds. You will come to know God even better.
text: Ya daŋni ma zim nannɛ, chen ni ma zi tiŋu a chi chenani ya kunyan ti daŋni a sɔɔni o tuha saha maga, a tum tum were nɛnɛ a zim Koosa a gbaari,

ref: I pray that you will be grateful to God for letting you have part in what he has promised his people in the kingdom of light.
text: aa kizaami ya kunyana Koosa. Waa nyɛ ya nyinbaan di ya wa zu o tɔha naa la chaani, chen ni ya wa o nara zi wa di o kin nawara o fun vɔu di o nyɛ yau.

ref: God rescued us from the dark power of Satan and brought us into the kingdom of his dear Son,
text: O fun a yisi ya a li sintana naa nyɛn birsi ni, nin awa kpok ni, a kpa ya a la du o be daŋni koor ti ni.

ref: Christ is exactly like God, who cannot be seen. He is the first-born Son, superior to all creation.
text: Kristo bambi chi Koosa naa ya vɛ koti a naali, bambire. O be bɛgim ti zenee a kaali kina maga.

ref: Everything was created by him, everything in heaven and on earth, everything seen and unseen, including all forces and powers, and all rulers and authorities. All things were created by God's Son, and everything was made for him.
text: Koosa fun nyɛ o naami kin nawara maga nyɛn tɛɛnɛ nɔ maga awa buudaha ni, kin naa ya na awa a naa ya vɛ naali, siim maga awa kpok maga, a magwa o fun a naami a nyɛ o titi ni.

ref: God's Son was before all else, and by him everything is held together.
text: Waa funɛ te a nyɛn kina maga ni. O kpok ti daha, a nama maga ha vɛɛn nyɛn hali wa zinan.

ref: He is the head of his body, which is the church. He is the very beginning, the first to be raised from death, so that he would be above all others.
text: Waa ya ba naa tiŋ un chen, nyuhu tiina. Ba naa tiŋ un chen chi o barawa. Waa nyɛ ba o mi fali ti. Koosa funɛ te lɛli un a li o sou ni, chen ni o duŋduŋ la zi te kina maga suwachak.

ref: God himself was pleased to live fully in his Son.
text: Yesu ya Koosa titi. O funɛ ya o tutɔrɛ o wɛ maga fun a nyɛn Yesu ni.

ref: And God was pleased for him to make peace by sacrificing his blood on the cross, so that all beings in heaven and on earth would be brought back to God.
text: Koosa fun a nyɛ o be ti fun sou a li daakakli ti ni di o chɛl li, chen ni kin nawara maga nyɛn tɛɛnɛ nɔ maga awa buudaha ni wa Koosa zi kotiu a ya nɔ bɛgim a kpak bara sɔɔna.

ref: You used to be far from God. Your thoughts made you his enemies, and you did evil things.
text: Saha digi ma wa fun a zim Koosa a la tum tum tagna a la lisi lise tagna. Chendaha ma fun a ya o dɔma.

ref: But his Son became a human and died. So God made peace with you, and now he lets you stand in his presence as people who are holy and faultless and innocent.
text: Amaa lalaknɔ Koosa be ti sou daha, Koosa wa ma fun ya nɔ bɛgim, chen ni wuzu digi Kristo zi wa kpa mau a du Koosa suwachak ni, ma wa zi wa kpak galimsa o wati a ya tu chaan tima.

ref: But you must stay deeply rooted and firm in your faith. You must not give up the hope you received when you heard the good news. It was preached to everyone on earth, and I myself have become a servant of this message. Paul's Service to the Church
text: Amaa o lawa maa tiŋ wa wutiu a nyɛ ma se su un nɛnɛ, chen ni kundɔŋ wa to a la zi bur ma gantɛl, a kpak bambi bɛgim a li chenani ma fun te nu Koosa laaboor weri ti chen. Chenani Pɔɔl Fun Biksi Yesu Nitiŋɛ

ref: I am glad I can suffer for you. I am pleased also that in my own body I can continue the suffering of Christ for his body, the church.
text: Min ya o laaboor weri naa ba kpa aa biksi bar damati ni, tumtumna. Mu chiŋɛ ma bar chiŋi ni a namsi lalaknɔ ma daha, amaa mu tu sɔɔniu. Kristo funɛ nyɛn tɛɛnɛ nɔ maga ni, o fun a namsi kinkan o nitiŋɛ ba naa chi o bara chen daha. Mu namsu a gbaari un ni.

ref: God's plan was to make me a servant of his church and to send me to preach his complete message to you.
text: Koosa nyɛ mu tum a nyɛ o nitiŋɛ ta ni, chen ni mu zi suŋi bau kinkan. Waa funɛ nyɛ mu ya chen tumtumna a ŋɔ di muu biksi o laaboor weri ti maga hali a wa peti.

ref: For ages and ages this message was kept secret from everyone, but now it has been explained to God's people.
text: O laaboor weri ti funɛ sogliu nara wati saha digi. Amaa lalaknɔ Koosa funɛ kpa unu a li gbampulim a nyɛ o nara zim un.

ref: God did this because he wanted you Gentiles to understand his wonderful and glorious mystery. And the mystery is that Christ lives in you, and he is your hope of sharing in God's glory.
text: O funɛ ya o tutɔrɛ o biksi o wu sogli nɔ mun a nyɛ o nara ni. Waa sir ya wu weri kinkan ba naa vɛ ya Ju tim chen wati. Nan ya o wu sogli ti. Kristo ti nyɛn ma ni. Chendaha ma kpak bambi bɛgim di wuzu digi Koosa zi wa kpa a li o jirima niu a nyɛ ma.

ref: We announce the message about Christ, and we use all our wisdom to warn and teach everyone, so all of Christ's followers will grow and become mature.
text: Kristo wɛ duŋduŋnɛ ya yaa biksi nara. Yaa kpami nara maga a biksi ba awa zima maga, chen ni ba zi wa ya nibin wereu kinkan, domi ba wa Kristo ya nibɛgimnɛ.

ref: This is why I work so hard and use the mighty power he gives me.
text: Chendaha mu si sɛri mu tum ni ka mu kpaŋi kinkan. Kristo la nyɛ min o kpok ti kinkan, chen ni mu zi kotiu a tum chen.

ref: I want you to know what a struggle I am going through for you, for God's people at Laodicea, and for all of those followers who have never met me.
text: Mu daŋni ma zimu chenani mu baga nyɛn ma awa Laodisia tima wa ba naa vɛ zim min.

ref: I do it to encourage them. Then as their hearts are joined together in love, they will be wonderfully blessed with complete understanding. And they will truly know Christ. Not only is he the key to God's mystery,
text: Mu kpaŋi mu titiu di mu kpami ma maga, chen ni ma zi ya nibɛgimu domi maa daŋni dɔŋau a zim Koosa wu sogli mun nɛnɛ a ta beeli. O wu sogli ti ya Kristo.

ref: but all wisdom and knowledge are hidden away in him.
text: Koosa zima awa nɛha maga nyɛn Kristo ni.

ref: I tell you these things to keep you from being fooled by fancy talk.
text: Mu biksi ma nan, chen ni nandigi wa kpa sɛm naa chi wuti a sɛm ma, o wa zi koti a mur ma.

ref: Even though I am not with you, I keep thinking about you. I am glad to know that you are living as you should and your faith in Christ is strong. Christ Brings Real Life
text: Mu wa ma bol wa dɔŋau, amaa mu baga nyɛn di ma maga se su Kristo kinkan ka maa tiŋ o nyinbaan aa kpak un nɛnɛ. Ma ya chen, mu tuha zi sɔɔniu. Kristo Fun Kpa O Mi Fali Ti A Nyɛ Ya

ref: You have accepted Christ Jesus as your Lord. Now keep on following him.
text: Ma fun la nɔɔni di Yesu Kristo ya ma kunyana. Chendaha maa tiŋ un nɛnɛ.

ref: Plant your roots in Christ and let him be the foundation for your life. Be strong in your faith, just as you were taught. And be grateful.
text: Ma nyɛ ma bambe kpak Yesu nɛnɛ a nyɛ ma se su un a gbaari, a chi chenani Ɛpafras fun te biksi ma chen. Maa zaami Koosa kinkan saha maga.

ref: Don't let anyone fool you by using senseless arguments. These arguments may sound wise, but they are only human teachings. They come from the powers of this world and not from Christ.
text: Biksi bɔnɛ nyɛn doon ba yir zima. Nara bɔnɛ biksi a, amaa a ya yɔrirɛ. O ya nibinsa zimarɛ ba la alizin tagna wati. Adaha ma ta nyɛ ba wa kpak ma a muri. A nama wa li Kristo wati.

ref: God lives fully in Christ.
text: Chenani Koosa du nyɛn Kristo bara nɛɛ.

ref: And you are fully grown because you belong to Christ, who is over every power and authority.
text: Kristo ya kina maga kpok tiina. Ma wa un ya nibɛgimnɛ. Chendaha ma kpak o mi fali ti.

ref: God wiped out the charges that were against us for disobeying the Law of Moses. He took them away and nailed them to the cross.
text: Chiksɛ naa ya fun chɔk awa tum tagna naa ya fun tum ka Koosa fun sɔbi a a du o tɔn ni, o fun duŋni a a ta. O chi o funɛ kpa au a kpaasi mari Kristo daakakli ti ni.

ref: There Christ defeated all powers and forces. He let the whole world see them being led away as prisoners when he celebrated his victory.
text: Yesu funɛ sou a li o daakakli ti ni, o fun a chɔk alizin tagna maga kpok a fun kpa a a li gbampulim, chen ni nara zi wa zimu di a ya yɔrirɛ lalaknɔ.

ref: Don't let anyone tell you what you must eat or drink. Don't let them say you must celebrate the New Moon festival, the Sabbath, or any other festival.
text: Nandigi ŋɔ di maa di diwe digirɛ a la nyɔ kinyɔɔli digi a vɛ tiŋ wuzu zene awa pɛn falɛ wuzu zene awa hiisi wuzuna a na ma galimsa, ma ta nu ba wati.

ref: These things are only a shadow of what was to come. But Christ is real!
text: Kin nama wa bu ya kibirige. Kristo kin nawara ya wuti chiŋɛ a bar chiŋi ni lalaknɔ.

ref: They are no longer part of Christ, who is the head of the whole body. Christ gives the body its strength, and he uses its joints and muscles to hold it together, as it grows by the power of God. Christ Brings New Life
text: O wara tiŋ Kristo naa ya ya nyuhu tiina. Ya waa ya o bara luk pɛksa a la na kpok awa suŋi a li un ni. O wa ya ya nibɛgimnɛ ka yaa bi a chi chenani Koosa daŋni yaa bi. O Chi Koosa Funɛ Lɛli Ya A Li Ya Sou Ni

ref: You died with Christ. Now the forces of the universe don't have any power over you. Why do you live as if you had to obey such rules as,
text: O chi ma wa Kristo funɛ sou. Chendaha ma wa tɛɛnɛ nɔ maga zima wa kpak wu digi wa dɔŋ ni. Tɔ. Yɛrɛ maa tiŋ tɛɛnɛ nɔ maga zima ti a chi ma wa tɛɛnɛ nɔ tim maga ha vɛɛn ya nibɛgim? Yɛrɛ maa tiŋ nibinsa chiina,

ref: “Don't handle this. Don't taste that. Don't touch this.”?
text: a la ɔm di ma gbaŋsi kibɔnɛ a lɛmsi bɔnɛ aa di?

ref: After these things are used, they are no longer good for anything. So why be bothered with the rules that humans have made up?
text: Chiina awa chiksɛ na nibinsa fun naami ka maa tiŋ a nan, a ya yɔrirɛ.

ref: Obeying these rules may seem to be the smart thing to do. They appear to make you love God more and to be very humble and to have control over your body. But they don't really have any power over our desires.
text: Chenani ba daŋni ba nyɛ malaikasa jirima a kilisi di ba ya nibin jɛɛgɛwa a kimuksi ba bara kinkan, nyɛ nara lisi di ba kpak zimau. Kin nama wa zi nyɛ ba gil ba tutɔ daŋnɛ.

ref: You have been raised to life with Christ. Now set your heart on what is in heaven, where Christ rules at God's right side.
text: Koosa funɛ lagmi lɛli ma wa Kristo a li ma sou ni. Chendaha ma nyɛ ma bambe kilisi Koosa tɔhɔn ti kina wɛ. Kristo kanɛ Koosa nihɛɛ bar kani ni dooni.

ref: Think about what is up there, not about what is here on earth.
text: Ma kpa ma lise maga a du Koosa tɔhɔn ti kin ta ni. Ma ta kpa ma lise maga a du tɛɛnɛ nɔ maga kina ni.

ref: You died, which means that your life is hidden with Christ, who sits beside God.
text: O chi ma funɛ sitiu. Lalaknɔ Koosa funɛ tɔ o mi fali naa maa nyɛn Kristo ni a chiŋsi.

ref: Christ gives meaning to your life, and when he appears, you will also appear with him in glory.
text: Saha naa Kristo naa nyɛn ma ni, wa bur wa tɛɛnɛ nɔ maga, ma wa un zi wa lagmi dɔŋ niu a bɔni o jirima awa o chaani kinkan. Chenani Kristo Mi Fali Nyinbaan Du

ref: Don't be controlled by your body. Kill every desire for the wrong kind of sex. Don't be immoral or indecent or have evil thoughts. Don't be greedy, which is the same as worshiping idols.
text: Ma kpa ma tum tagna a ta. Ma ta kpa ma bara aa tum chɔkumsi tuma, a ta tum sakaal tuma koo tum tum tagna ma lisi tagna daha. Ma gbanko ta chi kidɔŋtima. Kidɔŋtim maga chi ba naa yaa nyɛ vursa wa jirima chene a ya yɔrirɛ.

ref: And this is exactly what you did, when you lived among people who behaved in this way.
text: Ma wa ba naa vɛ tiŋ Koosa nɔ funɛ lagmi, ma gbanko funɛ tum tum tagnau a chi a.

ref: But now you must stop doing such things. You must quit being angry, hateful, and evil. You must no longer say insulting or cruel things about others.
text: Amaa lalaknɔ ma gil a magau. Ma ta na paan a du nara ni. Ma ta chɔk ma dɔŋtim sɔna a ta pini dɔŋ zoma a ta sɛm sɛm tagna,

ref: And stop lying to each other. You have given up your old way of life with its habits.
text: awa nusuna a nyɛ dɔŋ ni. Ma funɛ piin kpa ma gantɛl tuha kina wɛu a ta. Chendaha ma ta tum chen.

ref: Each of you is now a new person. You are becoming more and more like your Creator, and you will understand him better.
text: Lalaknɔwa ma kpak ma suwachak tuhu kin a naa Koosa fun kpa a nyɛ ma. A chi o titi kinawa. Waa la kɔɔri a saha maga, chen ni ma zi kotiu a zim un hali o wa peti.

ref: It doesn't matter if you are a Greek or a Jew, or if you are circumcised or not. You may even be a barbarian or a Scythian, and you may be a slave or a free person. Yet Christ is all that matters, and he lives in all of us.
text: Ba naa kpak Koosa suwachak tuhu kina wɛ, ba wara zim di digi ya Ju timwa ka digi ka vɛ yaali. Ba wara zim di digi teŋu ka digi ka vɛ teŋi. Ba wara zim di digi ya hɔɔrrɛ ka digi ka vɛ yaali. Ba wara zim di digi ya yomne ka digi ka vɛ yaali. Baa zimu di Kristo kaali kina maga. Waa nyɛn o nitiŋɛ ta maga wati.

ref: God loves you and has chosen you as his own special people. So be gentle, kind, humble, meek, and patient.
text: Ma ya Koosa narawa. O fun a lisi ma a nyɛ o titi ni a la daŋni ma kinkan. Ma kpak dɔŋa awa siki a kikɔɔri dɔŋa sɔna a ya jɛrgɛ tima a kpak kanyita a du nara ni,

ref: Put up with each other, and forgive anyone who does you wrong, just as Christ has forgiven you.
text: aa kisuŋi ba. Ma wa ma dɔŋtima vɛ dɔŋa, ma gil a nyɛ ba. Ya kunyan ti funɛ gil ma tum tagnau a nyɛ ma. Chendaha ma gbanko gil ma dɔŋtima tum tagna a nyɛ ba.

ref: Love is more important than anything else. It is what ties everything completely together.
text: Maa daŋni dɔŋa a kaali kina maga. Maa daŋni dɔŋa, ma zi kotiu a tum kin nama maga.

ref: Each one of you is part of the body of Christ, and you were chosen to live together in peace. So let the peace that comes from Christ control your thoughts. And be grateful.
text: Ma nyɛ Kristo nyɛ ma bara sɔɔna a dɔ ma. Koosa fun a yir ma di ma maga kpak o bara sɔɔna, chen ni ma wa un zi ya bar bɛgimu. Nan daha maa zaami Koosa saha maga.

ref: Let the message about Christ completely fill your lives, while you use all your wisdom to teach and instruct each other. With thankful hearts, sing psalms, hymns, and spiritual songs to God.
text: Ma nyɛ Kristo sɛma nyɛn ma bambe ni nɛnɛ a kpa o zima a biksi dɔŋa a kikpami dɔŋa a lɔ boola naa Koosa siim weri ti nyɛ ma, a kipɛgi Koosa aa kizaami un kinkan.

ref: Whatever you say or do should be done in the name of the Lord Jesus, as you give thanks to God the Father because of him. Some Rules for Christian Living
text: Kin naa maga maa ya awa chenani maga ma sɛm, ma nyɛ a maga li ya kunyan Yesu sɔn ti ni a kizaami ya kunyan Koosa o sɔn ti gbanko daha. Chenani Ya Maga Zi Lagmi Nyɛn

ref: A wife must put her husband first. This is her duty as a follower of the Lord.
text: Nihaana, o deŋlu wa maa tiŋ ma baalasa nɔɔna domi ma ya Yesu nitiŋɛwa.

ref: A husband must love his wife and not abuse her.
text: Nibaala, maa daŋni ma haanasa nɛnɛ a ta kpak tu haasa a du ba ni.

ref: Parents, don't be hard on your children. If you are, they might give up.
text: Nyama awa numa, ma ta yaa kitɛsi ma bisa chen ni ba tusa zi chɔku.

ref: Slaves, you must always obey your earthly masters. Try to please them at all times, and not just when you think they are watching. Honor the Lord and serve your masters with your whole heart.
text: Yosa, maa tiŋ ma kunyama nɔɔna a li kina maga ni. Ma ta tum kinkan a li ba se duŋduŋ ni, amaa maa tum ma bambe ni saha maga, domi ma nyɛ ya kunyan Yesu jirimarɛ.

ref: Do your work willingly, as though you were serving the Lord himself, and not just your earthly master.
text: Ma wa tum a nyɛ nibinsi nɛɛ, amaa ma tum a nyɛ ya kunyan ti nɛɛ. Chendaha ma kpak un ma bambe ni a tum nɛnɛ saha maga.

ref: In fact, the Lord Christ is the one you are really serving, and you know he will reward you.
text: Ma tum a nyɛ ya kunyana Yesu Kristo nee. Wuzu digi waa la zi wa bɔ ma ma chim a kpa kin nawara o fun kpa chiŋsi a nyɛ ma.

ref: Slave owners, be fair and honest with your slaves. Don't forget that you have a Master in heaven.
text: Ma naa kpak yosa, ma ya nɛnɛ a nyɛ ba. Ma lisi di ma kunyan ti nyɛn a li Koosa tɔhɔn ti ni. O Lawa Ya Yaa Kisumi Koosau

ref: Never give up praying. And when you pray, keep alert and be thankful.
text: Ma yaa kisumi Koosa a doso di ma zaami un saha maga.

ref: Be sure to pray that God will make a way for us to spread his message and explain the mystery about Christ, even though I am in jail for doing this.
text: Maa sumi Koosa gbanko a nyɛ ya di o nyɛ ya nyinbaan ya sɛm nara ni o laaboor weri ti wɛ aa biksi ba o kisogli wɛ. O wu sogli ti ya Kristo. O laaboor weri ti daha ba fun tɔ min dɛ.

ref: Be pleasant and hold their interest when you speak the message. Choose your words carefully and be ready to give answers to anyone who asks questions. Final Greetings
text: Maa doso chenani ma sɛm a nyɛ nara ni, chen ni ma sɛm maga zi weru a lɛm. Nar pɛɛsi ma wu digi, o lawa ma kotiu a ŋɔ un nɛnɛ. Pɔɔl Mak Tɔn Nɔ Bar Nɔwa

ref: Tychicus is the dear friend, who faithfully works and serves the Lord with us, and he will give you the news about me.
text: Tɔ. Ya bi daŋni, Tikikus, naa suŋi ya kinkan, zi ŋɔ ma mu wɛ magau. O wa ya ya ya kunyan ti tumtumsa.

ref: I am sending him to cheer you up by telling you how we are getting along.
text: Chendaha mu fun a tum un ma wati di o ŋɔ ma ya wɛ a kpami ma.

ref: Onesimus, the dear and faithful follower from your own group, is coming with him. The two of them will tell you everything that has happened here.
text: O wa Onisimus funɛ lagmi a la. Onisimus naa la suŋi ya kinkan, ya ma digirɛ. Yaa daŋni unu kinkan. Nara balɛ na zi ŋɔ mau chen naa maga funɛ ya bar nɔ.

ref: Aristarchus is in jail with me. He sends greetings to you, and so does Mark, the cousin of Barnabas. You have already been told to welcome Mark, if he visits you.
text: Ba fun tɔ min awa baal digi dɛ. O sɔn ya Aristakus. O wa Maak, Barnabas niinbe, zaami mau. Mu funɛ te ŋɔ ma Maak wɛu. O wa wa ma wati, ma la un du.

ref: Jesus, who is known as Justus, sends his greetings. These three men are the only Jewish followers who have worked with me for the kingdom of God. They have given me much comfort.
text: Jɔsua naa ba yir Jastus, gbanko zaami mau. Nara batora nama duŋduŋ ya Ju tima ba naa se su Yesu ka ba suŋi min kinkan a li Koosa koor ti tum ni a la belimi min.

ref: I have seen how much trouble he has gone through for you and for the followers in Laodicea and Hierapolis.
text: Min ya Ɛpafras sɛhɛra tiina di o tum kinkanu a nyɛ ma awa ba naa maga nyɛn Laodisia awa Hirapɔlɔs ni.

ref: Our dear doctor Luke sends you his greetings, and so does Demas.
text: Ya nibin daŋni luri tiina, Luk, awa Dimas gbanko zaami mau.

ref: Give my greetings to the followers at Laodicea, especially to Nympha and the church that meets in her home.
text: Ma zaami Yesu nitiŋɛ ba naa nyɛn Laodisia awa ya towe Nimfa awa Yesu nitiŋɛ ba naa lagmi o dam ni chen a nyɛ ya.

ref: After this letter has been read to your people, be sure to have it read in the church at Laodicea. And you should read the letter that I have sent to them.
text: Ma wa karimi tɔn nɔ peti, ma kpa un a la nyɛ Yesu nitiŋɛ ba naa nyɛn Laodisia ni chen, chen ni ba gbanko zi karimi unu. Ba gbanko zi kpa tɔnu a nyɛ ma. Ma wa la un, ma karimi un nɛnɛ.

ref: Remind Archippus to do the work that the Lord has given him to do.
text: Mu daŋni ma ŋɔ Arkipus ni di o lawa o tum tum naa Koosa fun kpa nyɛ un chenu a peti.

ref: I am signing this letter myself: PAUL. Don't forget that I am in jail. I pray that God will be kind to you.
text: Mu titi la sɔbi sɛm na bar nɔ a zaami ma. Maa lisi di mu ha vɛɛn tɔ dɛrɛ. Koosa suŋi ma.

ref: From Paul, Silas, and Timothy. To the church in Thessalonica, the people of God the Father and of the Lord Jesus Christ. I pray that God will be kind to you and will bless you with peace!
text: Min, Pɔɔl, awa Silvenus wa Timoti zaami ma naa tiŋ ya kunyan Yesu chenu a li Tɛsalɔnika ni. Mu waa, Pɔɔl, la sɔbi tɔn nɔ a nyɛ ma. Ya kunyan Yesu Kristo ti awa ya kunyan Koosa dɔ ma. Waa la zi suŋi ma a nyɛ ma bara sɔɔna. Ma Se Su Koosa Nɛnɛ

ref: We thank God for you and always mention you in our prayers. Each time we pray,
text: Yaa zaami Koosau saha maga a la sumi un ma daha.

ref: we tell God our Father about your faith and loving work and about your firm hope in our Lord Jesus Christ. The Thessalonians' Faith and Example
text: Yaa ŋɔ ya kunyan Koosau chenani maa tum o tuma domi ma se su un. Maa tumu hali a wa ku, domi maa daŋni unu kinkan aa tiŋ un wa kanyita ni.

ref: My dear friends, God loves you, and we know he has chosen you to be his people.
text: Mu niinbisa, ya zimu di Koosa daŋni mau a fun lisi ma a nyɛ o titi ni.

ref: When we told you the good news, it was with the power and assurance that come from the Holy Spirit, and not simply with words. You knew what kind of people we were and how we helped you.
text: Domi ya funɛ te wa biksi ma Koosa laaboor weri ti wɛu, o wa fun ya ya sɛma duŋduŋnɛ ya biksi ma. Koosa siim weri ti funɛ kpa o kpok ti a du un ni. Chendaha ma nidigi vɛ beeli. Ma funɛ na chenani ya nyɛni maga duu a la biksi ma. Ma daha ya fun nyɛn chen,

ref: So, when you accepted the message, you followed our example and the example of the Lord. You suffered, but the Holy Spirit made you glad.
text: ka ma fun a tiŋ ya awa ya kunyan ti. Domi ma funɛ la nɔɔniu Koosa laaboor weri ti ni, nara funɛ muksi ma kinkan, amaa Koosa siim weri ti funɛ nyɛ ma tusa sɔɔniu kinkan.

ref: You became an example for all the Lord's followers in Macedonia and Achaia.
text: Chendaha ba naa maga se su Yesu a nyɛn Masɛdonia pulum awa Girik tim pulum ni, funɛ tiŋu a chi chenani maa tiŋ chen.

ref: And because of you, the Lord's message has spread everywhere in those regions. Now the news of your faith in God is known all over the world, and we don't have to say a thing about it.
text: Ma waa funɛ kpa Yesu laaboor weri ti a wa ŋɔ ba o wɛ, ba naa nyɛn bawu maga ni funɛ nu ma wɛu di ma se su Koosa. Ya wa bur a daŋni ya sɛm kinkan.

ref: Everyone is talking about how you welcomed us and how you turned away from idols to serve the true and living God.
text: Saha naa ya fun wa ma wati chen, ma funɛ la ya a duu a nu ya sɛma. Nara maga ŋɔ yau chenani ma gil vuga jirima nyɛɛli a burgi a tiŋ Koosa naa ya wuti tiina awa miisa tiina.

ref: They also tell how you are waiting for his Son Jesus to come from heaven. God raised him from death, and on the day of judgment Jesus will save us from God's anger.
text: Lalaknɔ maa tum o tumwa a la pɔ o be Yesu naa kaa wa li Koosa tɔhɔn ti ni a bur wa. Koosa funɛ lɛli unu a li o sou ni. Waa ya naa la zi yisi ya a li chenani Koosa zi na paan a du ya a lɛrgi ya diŋsa ni.

ref: My friends, you know our time with you wasn't wasted.
text: Mu niinbisa, ma titi zimu di ya funɛ nyɛn ma wati, ya tusa funɛ sɔɔni awa chenani ya tumu.

ref: As you remember, we had been mistreated and insulted at Philippi. But God gave us the courage to tell you the good news about him, even though many people caused us trouble.
text: Ma zim chenani Filipai tima fun te tum tum tagna a du ya ni a la pini ya kinkan ka ya zi wa pu ma Tɛsalɔnika ni. Ya funɛ nyɛn ma wati, ba naa funɛ nyɛn dooni ha vɛɛna muksi yau kinkan, amaa Koosa funɛ nyɛ ya o kpoku ya kpak bambi a ŋɔ ma o laaboor weri ti wɛ.

ref: We didn't have any hidden motives when we won you over, and we didn't try to fool or trick anyone.
text: Laaboor weri naa ya funɛ sɛm ma a la sumi ma di ma nu, o maga funɛ ya wutirɛ. Ya wara daŋni ya suni wɛ di ya mur ma a kidaŋni nyɔɔra ma daha.

ref: You also know we didn't try to flatter anyone. God himself knows what we did wasn't a cover-up for greed.
text: Ma zim nɛnɛ di ya funɛ biksi ma chen, ya wa funɛ pɛgi ma wa ya nyina nɛɛ a la mur ma. Ya wa funɛ mur narawa di ya la kina. Koosa ya ya sɛhɛra tiina kin nama ni.

ref: We were not trying to get you or anyone else to praise us.
text: Ya wa funɛ daŋni sɔniwa ma wati koo nandigi wati.

ref: But as apostles, we could have demanded help from you. After all, Christ is the one who sent us. We chose to be like children or like a mother nursing her baby.
text: Ya fu daŋni ya kpak kpok ma wati, ya fu zi koti a kpak unu domi ya ya Kristo nitumɛ tawa. Ya funɛ nyɛn ma wati, ya funɛ kpak kanyitau dɛɛsi ma a chi nihaan yaa dɛɛsi o be chen.

ref: We cared so much for you, and you became so dear to us, that we were willing to give our lives for you when we gave you God's message.
text: Domi ya funɛ daŋni mau kinkan, o wa fun ya di Koosa laaboor weri ti duŋduŋnɛ ya funɛ daŋni ya kpa a nyɛ ma. Hali ya funɛ daŋni ya kpa ya titi miisarɛ a nyɛ ma.

ref: My dear friends, you surely haven't forgotten our hard work and hardships. You remember how night and day we struggled to make a living, so we could tell you God's message without being a burden to anyone.
text: Mu niinbisa, ma lisi chenani ya funɛ tum saha maga hali a wa ku, chen ni ya zi kotiu a biksi ma Koosa laaboor weri ti a ta bu muksi ma diwe daha.

ref: Both you and God are witnesses that we were pure and honest and innocent in our dealings with you followers of the Lord.
text: Ma waa ya ya sɛhɛra tima. Koosa gbanko ya ya sɛhɛra tiina. Ya nyɛni kpa la ma wati funɛ deŋliu a wer kinkan. Nandigi wa fun koti a na ya galimsa.

ref: You also know we did everything for you that parents would do for their own children.
text: Ya funɛ dɛɛsi ma a chi chenani nyama dɛɛsi ba bisa chen.

ref: We begged, encouraged, and urged each of you to live in a way that would honor God. He is the one who chose you to share in his own kingdom and glory.
text: Ya funɛ belimi mau a la kpami ma a ŋɔ ma di ma tum tum naa la zi sɔɔni Koosa tuha. Waa ya naa funɛ yir ma di ma wa zu o koor ti. O wa ma zi wa bɔni o jirima awa o chaaniu wuzu digi.

ref: We always thank God that you believed the message we preached. It came from him, and it isn't something made up by humans. You accepted it as God's message, and now he is working in you.
text: Ya gbanko yaa zaami Koosau domi ya funɛ a wa ma wati a fun ŋɔ ma Koosa sɛma, ma funɛ nuu a la nɔɔni di a ya wutiu. A wa fun ya nibinsa sɛmwa amaa Koosa titi sɛmwa. O kpa o sɛma aa du ma naa se su un di aa tum ma ni.

ref: My friends, you did just like God's churches in Judea and like the other followers of Christ Jesus there. And so, you were mistreated by your own people, in the same way they were mistreated by their people.
text: Mu niinbisa, kin nawara funɛ ya Koosa nitiŋɛ ba naa funɛ nyɛn Judia pulum ni a tiŋ Yesu Kristo chen, chen vɛɛna ya ma doon gbanko chen ni. Ma titi nara funɛ muksi ma kinkan a chi Ju tima funɛ muksi Yesu nitiŋɛ ta a li Judia pulum ni.

ref: Those evil people killed the Lord Jesus and the prophets, and they even chased us away. God doesn't like what they do and neither does anyone else.
text: Ju tim ta funɛ kpu ya kunyan Yesu, ka ba bɔnɛ fun kpu Koosa witinsi ta. Ba bɔnɛ fun bukoo a namsi ya kinkan a duŋni ya a ta. Nara nama wa fun sɔɔni Koosa tuha. Ba ya nara maga dɔmwa.

ref: They keep us from speaking his message to the Gentiles and from leading them to be saved. They have always gone too far with their sins. Now God has finally become angry and will punish them. Paul Wants To Visit the Church Again
text: Ba funɛ daŋni ya gil Koosa laaboor weri ti a ta sɛm kinyɛ ba naa vɛ ya Ju tim ni, domi ba nuɛɛ, Koosa fu zi koti a yisi bau a li ba tum tagna ni. Chen funɛ ya ba tum tagin a kaali ba tum tagna maga. Lalaknɔ Koosa na paanu kinkan a du ba ni a zi wa ta ba yɔri. Ya Kpak Unu Ya Bambe Ni Di Ya Bu Wa Na Ma

ref: My friends, we were kept from coming to you for a while, but we never stopped thinking about you. We were eager to see you and tried our best to visit you in person.
text: Mu niinbisa, ya waa wara, ba funɛ waligi yau a li ma ni, ya wa fun koti a na dɔŋa wuzu bilɛ. Amaa ya ha funɛ vɛɛn a lisi ma wɛu. Ma wɛ funɛ nyɛn ya bambe niu ka ya funɛ kpaŋi kinkan di ya wa na ma.

ref: We really wanted to come. I myself tried several times, but Satan always stopped us.
text: O wa ya di bu bɛgimnɛ mu waa, Pɔɔl, funɛ kpaŋi di mu bur wa ma wati, amaa sintana funɛ tɔ ya nyinbaanu. Ya fun vɛ koti a waali.

ref: After all, when the Lord Jesus appears, who else but you will give us hope and joy and be like a glorious crown for us?
text: Amaa ma duŋduŋ ya ya jirima nara a nyɛ ya tusa sɔɔni a nyɛ ya kpak bambi bɛgim, domi saha naa ya kunyan Yesu wa bur wa, ya zi wa a di nyusumu o suwachak ni ma daha.

ref: You alone are our glory and joy!
text: Wuti ma waa ya ya jirima nara a nyɛ ya tusa sɔɔni kinkan.

ref: Finally, we couldn't stand it any longer. We decided to stay in Athens by ourselves
text: A saha ti mu funɛ pɔu hali a wa ku a vɛ nu ma laaboora, adaha mu fun la nɔɔni di mu ha kpalimi Atɛns ni mu duŋduŋ,

ref: and send our friend Timothy to you. He works with us as God's servant and preaches the good news about Christ. We wanted him to make you strong in your faith and to encourage you.
text: a fun a tum mu niinbe Timoti ma wati. Mu wa un lagmi aa tum Koosa tuma a la ŋɔ nara ni Koosa laaboor weri ti Kristo wɛ. Mu funɛ tum Timoti di o wa kpami ma a suŋi ma di ma se su Yesu nɛmɛ.

ref: We didn't want any of you to be discouraged by all these troubles. You knew we would have to suffer,
text: Ma ta bur gantɛl ba la muksi ma daha. Ma zimu di o ya Koosa tutɔrɛ di ba zi namsi ba naa tiŋ o nyinbaanu.

ref: because when we were with you, we told you this would happen. And we did suffer, as you well know.
text: Saha naa ya fun nyɛn ma wati, ya fun te ŋɔ ma di ba zi wa namsi mau. Chen fun wa ya a chi chenani ya fun piin ŋɔ ma chen.

ref: At last, when I could not wait any longer, I sent Timothy to find out about your faith. I hoped Satan had not tempted you and made all our work useless.
text: Saha naa ma wɛ fun wa muksi min kinkan, mu funɛ tum Timotiu ma wati di o wa na chenani ma du, a naa ma se ha vɛɛn su Yesu akoo ma se wa su un. Mu wa zim, ami sintana wa zaamsi mau ka ma tiŋ o nɔ ka ya tuma chɔk a ta yɔri.

ref: Timothy has now come back from his visit with you and has told us about your faith and love. He also said that you always have happy memories of us and that you want to see us as much as we want to see you.
text: Timoti funɛ wa ma watiu a bur wa ya wati. Laaboor naa o fun wa a wa ŋɔ ya chen funɛ ya ya lɛmlɛmu kinkan. O funɛ ŋɔ yau chenani ma se su Yesu ka ma daŋni nara. O funɛ ŋɔ ya di ma ha vɛɛn a lisi ya wɛu nɛnɛ, a la daŋni ma na ya a chi chenani yaa daŋni ya na ma nan.

ref: My friends, even though we have a lot of trouble and suffering, your faith makes us feel better about you.
text: Mu niinbisa, hali ya nyɛn muksi ni a la namsi nan, ma si suuli nyɛ ya tusa sɔɔniu ma daha.

ref: Your strong faith in the Lord is like a breath of new life.
text: Ma kpak kpok a kitiŋ ya kunyan ti nɛnɛ, ya bambe zi kpoku ma daha.

ref: How can we possibly thank God enough for all the happiness you have brought us?
text: Ya wa zim chenani ya zi pɛgi Koosa. Ya waa sɛm ma wɛ o wati, ya tusa yaa sɔɔniu kinkan.

ref: Day and night we sincerely pray that we will see you again and help you to have an even stronger faith.
text: Yaa sumi Koosau saha maga awa ba bambe ni di o nyɛ ya wa na ma bura, chen ni ya zi bukoo gbaari chenani ya fun piin biksi ma chenu a li Yesu nyinbaan tiŋi ti wɛ ni.

ref: We pray that God our Father and our Lord Jesus will let us visit you.
text: Ya kunyan Koosa awa ya kunyan Yesu wa nyɛ ya nyinbaan, ya zi wa ma watiu.

ref: May the Lord make your love for each other and for everyone else grow by leaps and bounds. This is how our love for you has grown.
text: Ya kunyan ti la zi suŋi ma maa daŋni dɔŋa kinkan awa nara maga a chi chenani yaa daŋni ma nan.

ref: And when our Lord comes with all his people, I pray he will make your hearts pure and innocent in the sight of God the Father.
text: Maa daŋni dɔŋa chen ni, Koosa zi nyɛ ma bambe kpoku, chen ni ya kunyan Yesu awa o walɛ maga a wa, ma zi wa kotiu a chiŋi ya kunyan Koosa suwachak ni awa tu chaana ka galimsa ta nyɛn ma ni.

ref: Finally, my dear friends, since you belong to the Lord Jesus, we beg and urge you to live as we taught you. Then you will please God. You are already living that way, but try even harder.
text: Mu niinbisa, ya funɛ biksi mau chenani ma zi tiŋ Koosa di o tu kisɔɔniu. Chene maa tiŋ chen. Amaa ya sumi mau Yesu sɔn daha di ma bukoo tiŋ chen a gbaari.

ref: Remember the instructions we gave you as followers of the Lord Jesus.
text: Ma zimu di ya kunyan Yesu kpok nyɛn chenani ya fun biksi ma chen ni.

ref: God wants you to be holy, so don't be immoral in matters of sex.
text: Koosa daŋni maa tum tum were duŋduŋnɛ a gil chɔkumsi tuma maga hali o wa peti.

ref: Don't be a slave of your desires or live like people who don't know God.
text: Ma ta daŋni nihaana yɔri yɔri a chi ba naa vɛ zim Koosa.

ref: God didn't choose you to be filthy, but to be pure.
text: Koosa wa fun lisi ya di ya tum chɔkumsa tuma, amaa o funɛ lisi yau di ya tum tum were.

ref: So if you don't obey these rules, you are not really disobeying us. Instead, you are disobeying God, who gives you his Holy Spirit.
text: Adaha ba naa wa vɛ ya biksi nɔ, o wa vɛ chenani nibinsa fun biksi, amaa o vɛ chenani Koosa funɛ biksirɛ. Waa funɛ kpa o siim weri ti a du ma ni.

ref: We don't have to write you about the need to love each other. God has taught you to do this,
text: O wara daŋni mu sɔbi ma chenani ma zi daŋni dɔŋa, domi Koosa titi funɛ piin biksi ma nanu.

ref: and you already have shown your love for all his people in Macedonia. But, my dear friends, we ask you to do even more.
text: Ya zimu di maa daŋni Yesu nitiŋɛ ba naa maga nyɛn Masɛdonia pulum ni. Adaha ya sumi mau ma ha vɛɛn kitum chen a gbaari.

ref: Try your best to live quietly, to mind your own business, and to work hard, just as we taught you to do.
text: Ma kpaŋi ma titi aa tum ma tuma balimm. Ma ta zu ma dɔŋtima wɛ ni. Ma gbanko kidi ma bara wilim ni a chi chenani ya fun piin a biksi ma chen.

ref: Then you will be respected by people who are not followers of the Lord, and you won't have to depend on anyone. The Lord's Coming
text: Maa tiŋ nan ni, ba naa funɛ vɛ di se wa zi su Yesu chen, ba zi nyɛ ma jirimau. Ma wa zi nyini nandigi se ni di o nyɛ ma kundɔŋ. Ya Kunyana Zi Bur Wau Lalaga

ref: My friends, we want you to understand how it will be for those followers who have already died. Then you won't grieve over them and be like people who don't have any hope.
text: Mu niinbisa, ya daŋni maa zim wutirɛ ba naa funɛ siti chen wɛ, chen ni ma tusa wa zi wa chɔk a chi ba naa vɛ kpak bambi bɛgim a li Yesu ni chen.
